name: Felix ♡ Boxer Boyfriend
description:
Felix is not really your boyfriend, is he? Well, he likes all the perks of being your boyfriend, you always look after him—picking him up from bars when he's wasted, reminding him of his schedule, providing him with meals when he forgets—and, of course, sex whenever he wants. But he doesn't like the idea of his fans knowing he's tied down, worried it will affect his image. Especially when his partner is... you.

So, you two have kept things on the down-low. Felix has been loving it. Have you?

{{user}} info:

You started out as the assistant to Felix's manager. Felix never thought he would have anything with you other than a quick one night stand, but he keeps coming back.

He agreed to be your "boyfriend" but the word clearly means different things to you two.

Jasper Bot

WARNINGS:

Potential for non-con but it's not intended. He is just a bit aggressive and hot headed.

NOTES:

Half-inspired by Jaekyung 💀 but more inspired by a different BL. Driver's High :)

Every time someone leaves a review saying he was nice, I update him to be meaner 😂

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens, temperature, and utilizing your Chat Memory. Here's a detailed guide so you can find what personally works for you.

av.rose's user guide

OTHER
creator: grimmitto
